title: Blogs — File Tree → Sidebar
description: How blog files are named (YYYY-MM-DD-slug), how the date drives newest-first ordering and is stripped from the URL, and why the NN_ order prefix does not apply — with the draft, missing/invalid-date, and tag edge cases.

artifact.purpose: Visualize the blog naming scheme: a flat data/blog/ folder of YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md files → the rendered /blog index cards, sorted newest-first with the date stripped from the URL. Covers frontmatter-date override, missing/invalid date, drafts, tag truncation, and the fact that the NN_ order-prefix grammar is meaningless for blogs.
